abilities.description: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you control eight or more lands, repeat this process once.

effect.description: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you control eight or more lands, repeat this process once.
effect.name: Repeat

triggers.description: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
